subcodes.first_line: Sanctified praise, transcending the world and all its peoples, befitteth the most exalted, most holy and most glorious court of the Desired One [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از عالم و عالمیان ساحه امنع اقدس اعز مقصودی را لایق و سزاست که
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @spiritual transformation, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
